title: Cabinet Office, Second Headquarters: Year in Review 2025
body: "As the Cabinet Office Second Headquarters reaches a four-year milestone, we have created a “Year in Review” to give you a detailed look at the breadth and depth of the activities we have undertaken over the past year. It showcases how our work contributes to the delivery of the Government’s key priorities and adds value for the Cabinet Office, across Government, and the communities in which we are so proudly based. This Year in Review highlights some examples of the work to deliver these priorities within the Second Headquarters, demonstrating the Cabinet Office’s commitment to increasing its impact in Glasgow. "
